text:
On Sat, 5 Jul 2008 00:10:25 UT, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/qsvn,
>
> Please note that PR ports/125294 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/125294

Please add the patch attached to fix build with new subversion
thanks
